title: SseConnectorOptions
description:
Constructor options for SseConnector — Server-Sent Events adapter. Source: packages/connector-sse/src/SseConnector.ts.

Protocol:
• GET  {url}        — SSE stream of events. Each event payload is JSON: { type: 'message' | 'typing' | 'connected', ... }
• POST {sendUrl}    — Outgoing message body (defaults to {url}).
• GET  {url}/history?cursor=... — Optional pagination endpoint.

sendUrl.description: POST URL for outgoing messages. Defaults to url.

headers.description: Extra headers sent with POST/history requests. EventSource itself does not accept custom headers — pass auth via query params in url.

reconnect.description: Re-initialise on error events. EventSource reconnects natively too — this just controls the connector's own retry behaviour.
